title: Choozle API Vocabulary
description: Key terms and concepts used in the Choozle Reporting API and platform.

terms.definition: Unique numeric identifier for a Choozle advertising account. Required parameter for report queries.
Unique numeric identifier for an ad group within a campaign. Optional filter parameter for report queries.
HMAC-SHA256-based authorization token obtained from the /api/authorization endpoint, valid for 2 hours. Passed as a request header in all authenticated API calls.
HMAC-SHA256 hex-encoded digest of the concatenated email and timestamp, signed with the user's API secret key. Required for token generation.
The total number of times an advertisement was displayed to a user during the reporting period.
The total number of times users clicked on an advertisement during the reporting period.
Total amount spent in USD on advertising for the reported account and date range.
The number of attributed conversion events (e.g., purchases, sign-ups) resulting from advertising during the reporting period.
Click-Through Rate — the ratio of clicks to impressions, expressed as a decimal (clicks / impressions).
Cost Per Click — the average cost in USD for each click received on an advertisement.
Cost Per Mille — the cost in USD per one thousand ad impressions.
Demand-Side Platform — a system that allows buyers of digital advertising inventory to manage multiple ad exchange and data exchange accounts through one interface. Choozle is a self-service DSP.
Connected TV — television content delivered over the internet via smart TVs or streaming devices. Choozle supports CTV advertising channels.
Digital Out-of-Home — digital advertising displayed in public environments such as digital billboards and transit displays. Choozle supports DOOH advertising.
Real-Time Bidding — an automated auction process for buying and selling digital advertising impressions in milliseconds as a webpage loads.
The start date (inclusive) of the reporting window in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The end date (inclusive) of the reporting window in YYYY-MM-DD format.
